subcodes.first_line: O Fayd! Thou hast attained unto My recognition, inasmuch as We guided thee unto Mine horizon, acquainted thee with My path, and caused thee to hear Mine utterances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فیض قد فزت بعرفانی اذ هدیناک الی افقی و عرفناک صراطی و اسمعناک آیاتی و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
